info.name: mockdr — Multi-Platform Security Mock API
info.description:
Multi-platform EDR/SIEM mock API. Import this collection to test SOAR playbooks and automation scripts.

**SentinelOne tokens:**
- Admin:       admin-token-0000-0000-000000000001
- Viewer:      viewer-token-0000-0000-000000000002
- SOC Analyst: soc-analyst-token-000-000000000003

**CrowdStrike credentials:**
- Admin:   cs-mock-admin-client / cs-mock-admin-secret
- Viewer:  cs-mock-viewer-client / cs-mock-viewer-secret
- Analyst: cs-mock-analyst-client / cs-mock-analyst-secret

**MDE credentials:**
- Admin:   mde-mock-admin-client / mde-mock-admin-secret
- Analyst: mde-mock-analyst-client / mde-mock-analyst-secret
- Viewer:  mde-mock-viewer-client / mde-mock-viewer-secret
- Tenant:  a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890

**Elastic Security:**
- Admin API key:   mock-es-admin-api-key
- Analyst API key: mock-es-analyst-api-key
- Viewer API key:  mock-es-viewer-api-key

**Cortex XDR (HMAC auth):**
- Admin key:   ID=1, secret=xdr-admin-secret
- Analyst key: ID=2, secret=xdr-analyst-secret

**Splunk:**
- admin / mockdr-admin
- analyst / mockdr-analyst
- viewer / mockdr-viewer
- HEC token (sentinelone): 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111

**Microsoft Sentinel:**
- client_id: sentinel-mock-client-id
- client_secret: sentinel-mock-client-secret

**Microsoft Graph credentials:**
- Admin:    graph-mock-admin-client / graph-mock-admin-secret
- Security: graph-mock-security-client / graph-mock-security-secret
- SMB:      graph-mock-smb-client / graph-mock-smb-secret
- Plan 1:   graph-mock-p1-client / graph-mock-p1-secret
- Intune:   graph-mock-intune-client / graph-mock-intune-secret
- Mail:     graph-mock-mail-client / graph-mock-mail-secret

item.name: Agent actions (disconnect / reconnect / initiate-scan / abort-scan / shutdown / restart)
Mitigate threat (kill / quarantine / remediate / rollback / un-quarantine)
Dev

request.description:
Available scenarios:
- mass_infection   → infect 20 random agents
- apt_campaign     → targeted attack on 10 agents
- agent_offline    → take 30% of agents offline
- quiet_day        → resolve all threats & heal agents

item.description: Non-S1 developer endpoints for controlling mock state. Not part of the real SentinelOne API.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Suspicious PowerShell",
  "description": "Detects suspicious PowerShell usage",
  "risk_score": 73,
  "severity": "high",
  "type": "query",
  "query": "process.name: powershell.exe AND process.args: (\"-enc\" OR \"-encoded\")",
  "language": "kuery",
  "enabled": true
}

item.name: Cortex XDR
item.description: XDR uses HMAC-SHA256 auth. Pre-compute: timestamp=epoch_ms, nonce=random, hash=SHA256(key_secret+nonce+timestamp), auth_header=hash. key_id=1, key_secret=xdr-admin-secret

urlencoded.value: search index=sentinelone severity=high | table time host threat_name
